name: Employment Hero
description: Monitor Employment Hero HR platform for employee access management, role-based controls, and HR policy compliance

credentialFields.label: API Token (Bearer Token)
credentialFields.helpText: Your Employment Hero OAuth2 Bearer token. Obtain from the Developer Portal in your Employment Hero account under your profile menu.

credentialFields.label: Organisation ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your Employment Hero organisation ID (UUID). Found via GET /api/v1/organisations after authenticating.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews all employees in Employment Hero with access to the HR platform, identifying active and terminated users

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies employee roles and team assignments in Employment Hero to ensure proper access control governance

checks.name: Publish Policies
checks.description: Verifies that HR policies are configured and published in Employment Hero for organizational compliance
